title: Lisianthius tatei
taxonomy: Lisianthius tatei is classified within the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as the gentian family. This family is part of the order Gentianales, which consists of flowering plants that include gentians, snapdragons, and goldenseals. The order Gentianales is further grouped under the subclass Asteridae, a clade of flowering plants that includes many families. The subclass Asteridae is part of the larger class Magnoliopsida, which comprises flowering plants that have two cotyledons in their seeds. Lisianthius tatei is a member of the class Magnoliopsida, indicating its position within the flowering plant group.
